programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing contestants from the team challenge are cooking to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: It's power apron week on MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The contestants with the three least impressive dishes from the invention test face off in the pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: An immunity challenge with a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Power Week. The elimination challenge will take place over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Power Week. The elimination challenge will take place over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge: Heston Blumenthal & Invention Test
programme.desc: Today's mystery box challenge has been set by the great Heston Blumenthal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test: Guillaume Brahimi's Jewel of the Sea
programme.desc: The judges reveal that the pressure test has been set by celebrated chef Guillaume Brahimi.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: Today the three contestants who impressed in Heston Blumenthal's invention test cook for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Afternoon Tea at The Hotel Windsor
programme.desc: Two teams prepare afternoon tea for 100 guests at Melbourne's The Hotel Windsor.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: In the invention test, the winner of the mystery box challenge will get to decide on the pantry items.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test: Janice Wong's Cassis Plum
programme.desc: The pressure test has been set by guest chef Janice Wong.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge: Batter
programme.desc: The contestants have 30 minutes to create a dish that showcases batter.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants will take part in a barbecue battle in the MasterChef Australia garden.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Rick Stein
programme.desc: The judges reveal that the challenge is all about fish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The top eight contestants take a trip down memory lane.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The bottom four contestants from the invention test must cook off to survive in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: In an immunity challenge like no other, the two contestants will cook off against two professional chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Off-site Challenge: Circa: The Prince
programme.desc: The judges reveal the contestants will be preparing a seven-course degustation menu for 40 diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Time Auction
programme.desc: The contestants facing elimination will take part in a time auction.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Marco Pierre White Team Challenge
programme.desc: As promised, Marco Pierre White returns to see how far the contestants have come.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test: Cook-Along
programme.desc: With no recipe and no clock, three contestants must cook along with Marco Pierre White

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: It is the last immunity pin up for grabs before finals week.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Real life Las Vegas hero, Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cheering For A Lucky Strike
programme.desc: Cheerleader Tex Iniguez shakes her pom poms past six figures in hopes of beating The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Lane
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama - bowling champion Kyera presses on in her battle against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Mile-High Millionaire
programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Bingo To A Million
programme.desc: Playing for his Golden Girls-style dream home, former Bingo caller Tony Oriente.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Musical
programme.desc: Business owner, La’Sherrie Butler Hogan showstops the stage, and the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Ironman
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero seeks to secure his children's future.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Monopoly Money
programme.desc: Real estate agent, Toni Miller is used to buying and selling hot properties.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - The Champ Vs. The Banker
programme.desc: Michael Chandler is used to taking some hits and putting up a good fight – and tonight is no different.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP83
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP31
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP25
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP27
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (27 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP28
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (28 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Wall Street Warrior
programme.desc: Lisa Glicksman knows exactly what kind of fight is needed to beat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Magic Touch
programme.desc: In another incredible combo game of Deal or No Deal, two new contestants fill the studio with magical moments.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Roller Coaster In Motion
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal comes to life with two Orlando contestants taking over.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Martinis for a Million
programme.desc: Laura Siano plans to save, spend and share; this game comes with martinis and male models.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Vision Quest
programme.desc: South Dakota’s Jade Delaney believes in the power of positive thinking and she has a vision board to prove it.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Looking For Luck (In All The Right Cases)
programme.desc: Nurse Andrew Shelton declares himself the unluckiest person ever to combat The Banker.

programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: French Restaurants
programme.desc: This episode splits the contestants into two teams and will be responsible for every aspect of the restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Childhood Memories
programme.desc: The contestants need to draw on childhood memories as an inspiration for their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The top five contestants enter the kitchen to face the last mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The three contestants from the invention test will cook off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: The three contestants from the invention test will cook off in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Panama Dining Room Service Challenge
programme.desc: The challenge is off-site at Panama Dining Room, in Melbourne's inner-city suburb of Fitzroy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Jacqui Challinor
programme.desc: The contestants are excited to arrive for their chance to cook for an Immunity Pin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Darren Purchese's Peach Melba
programme.desc: The group facing today’s Pressure Test wake for what may be their last day in the house

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: What's in the Fridge
programme.desc: It’s the first elimination of the season!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Ashley Palmer-Watts' Sherried Marron
programme.desc: It's the first pressure test of finals week and the bottom three contestants from the previous invention test line up for what will be the last time in the MasterChef kitchen for one of them.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Metter, Michelle and Samira wake in the house to find themselves facing a feared Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - SecondBite's Six-Course Degustation Challenge
programme.desc: This episode is all about raising money for Second Bite, a charity that the program supports. Contestants will cook using only ingredients donated by the charity, cooking a six-course degustation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Fast-Track to Finals Immunity Challenge: Reynold Poernomo and Matt Sinclair
programme.desc: The winner of the mystery box and of the invention test will face off in round one, vying for the chance to cook off against a professional cook in round two to get fast-tracked to Finals Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Nigella's Mystery Box Challenge & Food Physics Invention Test
programme.desc: It’s the start of a new week in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: It's the grand finale of 2018.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Royal Reception Catering Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants receive a surprise message in the Masterchef house which informs them of their next group challenge and where they'll be travelling to.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Saransh Goila
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test face elimination in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Elimination Challenge: World Class & MasterClass 5
programme.desc: The elimination challenge will determine who will go into the semifinal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Chocolate Wheel Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the previous challenge will fight for their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Maggie Beer's Chicken Elimination Challenge and MasterClass 2 Poh Ling Yeoh
programme.desc: For the elimination challenge, the contestants go to Maggie Beer's Eatery.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (19 out of 39)

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game.
